steps.title: Insert the filter into a 5...
steps.instruction: Insert the filter into a 5 ml PowerWater DNA Bead Tube.

steps.title: Add 1 ml of Solution PW1...
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml of Solution PW1 to the PowerWater DNA Bead

steps.title: Secure the tube horizontally to a...
steps.instruction: Secure the tube horizontally to a Vortex and tape it extensively

steps.title: Vortex at maximum speed for 5 min
steps.instruction: Vortex at maximum speed for 5 min. Centrifuge the tubes ≤4000 x g for 1 min at room temperature

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a clean...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 2 ml Collection Tube Draw up the supernatant using a 1 ml pipette tip by placing it down into the beads.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the supernatant to a clean 2 ml Collection Tube (provided).

steps.title: Add 200 µl of Solution IRS...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl of Solution IRS and vortex briefly to mix. Incubate at 2–8°C for 5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 13,000 x g for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 13,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Avoiding the pellet, transfer the supernatant to a clean 2 ml Collection Tube (provided).

steps.title: Add 650 µl of Solution PW3...
steps.instruction: Add 650 µl of Solution PW3 and vortex briefly to mix.

steps.title: Load 650 µl of supernatant onto an MB Spin Column
steps.instruction: Load 650 µl of supernatant onto an MB Spin Column. Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min. Discard the flow-through. Repeat until all the supernatant has been processed.

steps.title: Place the MB Spin Column Filter...
steps.instruction: Place the MB Spin Column Filter into a clean 2 ml Collection Tube.

steps.title: Add 650 µl of Solution PW4 (shake before use)
steps.instruction: Add 650 µl of Solution PW4 (shake before use). Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through and add 650...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through and add 650 µl of ethanol and centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min.

steps.title: Discard the flow-through and centrifuge again...
steps.instruction: Discard the flow-through and centrifuge again at 13,000 x g for 2 min.

steps.title: Place the MB Spin Column into...
steps.instruction: Place the MB Spin Column into a clean 2 ml Collection Tube

steps.title: Add 100 µl of Solution EB...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl of Solution EB to the center of the white filter membrane.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,000 x g for 1 min. 23. Discard the MB Spin Column. The DNA is now ready for downstream applications.
